title: Looking for Teacher at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners
company: LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners:
LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India South Asia Partners!
